title: Dirty Tonne Days - Demand
summary:
Main
Tanker - Weekly Market Monitor
Snapshot of Crude and Product Freight Rates, Supply-Demand
Week 38, September 19, 2024
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-09-20 134802.png | assets/2024-09-20_dirty-tonne-days-demand_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_ec62102ee3dd.png
This week's special focus dives into the dynamics between dirty tonne days and VLCC tonne days. The data reveals a distinct downward trend in VLCC tonne days, particularly noticeable from the end of the first quarter of this year. This trend suggests a weakening in the VLCC segment, reflecting broader market challenges.

OCR text:
Chart of the Week: Dirty Tonne Days - Demand
This week's analysis highlights the contrasting trends in dirty tonne days versus VLCC tonne days. The VLCC segment has experienced a noticeable decline since the end of the first quarter of this
year, in contrast to the growth observed in dirty tonne days.
